channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Lots of fly tipping, 28th April
item.description:
Fly tipping along the side of the mortuary.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Catherine Grove, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned assn with no mot, 28th April
item.description:
The vehicle has been abandoned at this location. The vehicle has no valid MOT (expired February 2026). The lack of movement, the scratched number plate together with the expired MOT indicates the vehicle is being left indefinitely. The location has experienced previous issues with vehicles being left for extended periods with another car currently abandoned and infested with mould. I request that the vehicle is inspected and dealt with as an abandoned vehicle. Please confirm what action will be taken and the expected timescale.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Blenheim Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken glass, 28th April
item.description:
Lots to of broken glass on pavement and in grass. Lots of children are in the area due to the football pitch as well as dogs, so very dangerous.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hatcham Street, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Small refrigerator, 28th April
item.description:
This was dumped on the pavement near the lane about 2 weeks ago and was then moved (I presume by gardening contractors working down the lane). It has been pushed on to the corner of the lane and pavement.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Milestone Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Big bag of builder's trash/abandoned car, 28th April
item.description:
This big bag from a house renovation has been dumped across the street from the long abandoned and vandalised car that is obviously encouraging tippers to use this part of the street.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Glendown Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken surface along Plough way, 28th April
item.description:
Broken Road surface all along Plough way SE16.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Windsock Close, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox - hit by car . Removed form road but need to be taken away, 28th April
item.description:
Dead fox - hit by car . Removed form road but need to be taken away
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Burnt Ash Lane, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping furniture, 28th April
item.description:
2x chairs and 1x white panel left in alleyway between Walworth square and ethal street.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 151, Walworth Road, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Constant Fly Tipping snd rubbish dumping, 28th April
item.description:
Bins open and exposed for people to constantly fly tip and dump their rubbish from all over! Needs sorting urgently!!!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Evergreen Square, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cars been parked here 3 months, 28th April
item.description:
The cars been here for more than 3 months

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Yarmouth Crescent, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Not fixed, 28th April
item.description:
It’s still untidy and full of random rubbish after Sunday service in the church on Glengall road! Evidence on the photos Please stop marking as fixed when it isn’t ! It’s so easy to check that it’s not attended by the cleaners!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Glengall Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish, 28th April
item.description:
This furniture has been dumped on the footpath since Christmas

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Downe Close, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car bumper and furniture, 28th April
item.description:
A car bumper and a sofa/chair has been left on the pavement
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gautrey Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 28th April
item.description:
A bed has been dumped at the top of Albert Road near the corner of Anglesea Road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Albert Road, Ramsden, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Settee left outside park, 28th April
item.description:
Settee dumped outside park for over a week, with other rubbish being piled on top. Other stuff been removed, but Settee been left, so if not picked up soon, other items will be dumped on top!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Evergreen Square, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter/tipping, 28th April
item.description:
You can see the tipping here that has been sitting here for days. Needs cleaning

Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Are these parking restrictions legitimate?, 28th April
item.description:
Sign and yellow lines for parking restrictions. Are these legitimate?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 79, Upland Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattresses dumped on Leithcote Path, 28th April
item.description:
Passed here 20 minutes ago and there was nothing. Now at 6:40PM 2 mattresses have been dumped on the pathway. Near Leithcote Path, Leithcote Lode, Nr 6.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Leithcote Path, Streatham Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Restaurant food rubbish dumped in public bins, 28th April
item.description:
The restaurant is disposing of food waste in the public litter bins.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chatterton Road, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Squashed pigeon in middle of road, 28th April
item.description:
Please could someone take it away, it's awful 🤢
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Thames Reach, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet
